description: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL fallback bug: empty string is falsy in JS so || fell back to localhost:3001 in production
resolution: Use nullish coalescing ?? instead of || so empty string means relative paths work correctly

name: inline-error-banners
description: Use flex+AlertCircle div with border-destructive/50 bg-destructive/10 for inline error states instead of alert() or toast; avoids needing Toaster mounted in layout. Success states use border-green-500/50 bg-green-500/10.

name: diffract_chat-route
description: Chat iframe uses /sandboxes/<name>/diffract_chat/ path. Proxied by Caddy with prefix stripping to gateway port. /__openclaw/* kept as legacy fallback. Token-based auth removed; username/password auth flows through without client-side token handling.

name: gateway-token-display
description: Gateway token display in chat-panel: useEffect fetches /api/gateway-token on mount, stores in state, renders token truncated with Copy button (copies to clipboard, shows Copied! for 2s). Placed between Agent label and New Session button.

name: log-viewer-tui-parity
description: normalizeLine must forward SandboxLogLine.fields (map<string,string>) and .target; UI renders source column (gateway/sandbox) + fields as key=value pairs to match diffract-tui format: HH:MM:SS {source:<7} {level:<5} {message} [key=val ...]

name: watch-sandbox-since-ms
description: WatchSandbox SSE endpoint accepts ?since_ms query param; when >0 sets log_since_ms on gRPC request and skips tail replay (log_tail_lines=0), avoiding duplicate lines on stream reconnect

name: openclaw-iframe-token-query
description: OpenClaw Control UI requires ?token=<gateway-token> in query string to render — without it body stays blank (no error, no loader). Dashboard iframe in ui/src/components/chat-panel.tsx must fetch /api/gateway-token first, then set src to /sandboxes/<name>/diffract_chat/?token=<token>. Fixed in commit abc2a4a.

content: Onboard wizard frontend at ui/src/app/(authenticated)/onboard/page.tsx. Step components under ui/src/components/onboard/. API helpers + SSE in ui/src/lib/onboard-client.ts. Uses subscribeJobEvents() for live provisioning logs. Build passes Next.js 16 Turbopack.

description: Next.js basePath doesn't auto-prefix raw fetch() calls in client components. When NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/dashboard, fetch('/api/status') still hits root /api/status, not /dashboard/api/status — goes to Next.js catch-all as 404. Seen in From Scrtch/diffract UI where page.tsx was stuck on 'Checking for existing sandboxes...'.
resolution: Export an api(path) helper from lib/config.ts that does basePath + path concatenation. Use fetch(api('/api/status')) in every client fetch and EventSource call. Also: Next.js standalone build doesn't auto-copy .next/static or public/ into .next/standalone/ — post-build step must 'cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static; cp -r public .next/standalone/public'.
